src_raw: The HKMA believes that, by putting an appropriate emphasis on responsible investment and sustainable long-term economic performance, it can better achieve the investment objectives of the Exchange Fund and reduce risks associated with environmental, social and governance (ESG)- related matters of its underlying investments.  The HKMA supports responsible investment by integrating ESG factors into the investment processes for both public and private market investments of the Exchange Fund, underpinned by the guiding principle that priority will generally be given to ESG investments if the long-term risk-adjusted return is comparable with other investments.  For more details about the HKMA’s responsible investment framework and implementation, see the Sustainability chapter on pages 184 to 191.
mt_raw: 金管局認為，透過適當重視負責任投資及可持續長期表現，可更有效地實現外匯基金的投資目標，並降低其基礎投資與環境、社會及管治(ESG)相關事項所涉及的風險。金管局支持負責任投資，方法是將ESG因素納入外匯基金公眾及私募市場投資的投資過程，其指導原則為：若ESG投資的長期經風險調整收益與其他投資相若，則一般會優先考慮ESG投資。如欲了解更多有關金管局負責任投資框架及實施細節，請參閱第184至191頁的「可持續發展」章節。

src_raw: The Public Enquiry Service provides an effective means for the public to better understand key HKMA functions and operations.  During 2021, it handled 9,781 enquiries. About half of them were related to banking policies and regulations, consumer banking issues, notes and coins, as well as financial infrastructure and debt market development. Some of the notable enquiries were about the Coin Collection Programme, banking products and services, banking-related guidelines and circulars and the Retail Bond Issuance Programme.
mt_raw: 公眾查詢服務為公眾提供一個有效途徑，以更好地了解金管局的主要職能及運作情況。2021年，該服務共處理了9,781宗查詢。其中約一半的查詢與銀行業政策及規例、銀行消費者事宜、紙幣及硬幣，以及金融基建和債券市場發展相關。硬幣收集計劃、銀行產品及服務、與銀行業相關的指引與通告，以及零售債券發行計劃，都是其中較受歡迎的查詢項目。

src_raw: Apart from the HKMA Annual Report, the HKMA published two issues of the Half-Yearly Monetary and Financial Stability Report, and four issues of the Quarterly Bulletin, and it regularly updated the Monthly Statistical Bulletin to provide up-to-date and thematic information and analyses on monetary, banking and economic issues in Hong Kong. mt_raw: 除了金管局《年報》外，金管局亦發布了兩期《貨幣與金融穩定情況半年度報告》及四期《季報》，並定期更新《金融數據月報》，以提供香港貨幣、銀行及經濟議題的最新及主題資訊及分析。金管局同時亦發布了11篇 inSight1 文章，介紹其主要的新舉措及政策，並討論香港關注的時事議題。

terms: {'ais': '認可機構', 'hkma': '金管局', 'information centre': '資訊中心', 'local representative office': '本地代表辦事處', 'register of security staff': '證券業務員工紀錄冊', 'banking ordinance': '銀行業條例'}
src_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, located on the 55th floor of Two International Finance Centre, is an important facility introducing the work of the HKMA to the community and promoting public awareness of monetary and banking matters.  It consists of an exhibition area and a library. The exhibition area presents an overview of the HKMA’s work and the development of money and banking in Hong Kong in an interactive manner.  It also contains information and exhibits for the study of Hong Kong’s monetary, banking and financial affairs.  The library, situated next to the exhibition area, houses more than 26,000 books, journals and other publications on Hong Kong’s monetary, banking and financial affairs as well as central banking topics.  It also maintains the register of AIs and local representative offices, as well as the register of securities staff of AIs, for public access as required by section 20 of the Banking Ordinance.
mt_raw: 位於兩國金融中心55樓的金管局資訊中心，是向公眾介紹金管局工作及推廣貨幣及銀行事務意識的重要設施。該中心設有展覽區及圖書館。展覽區以互動方式展示金管局的工作及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展情況，並設有有關香港貨幣、銀行及金融事務的研究資料及展品。圖書館設於展覽區旁，收藏超過26,000冊有關香港貨幣、銀行及金融事務以及中央銀行事務的書籍、期刊及其他出版物。圖書館亦根據銀行業條例第20條的規定，維護認可機構及本地代表辦事處的登記冊，以及認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊，以供公眾查閱。

src_raw: To reach out to the community and raise public awareness of the HKMA’s work, a public education programme has been running since 1998.  In 2021, a webinar was organised for over 2,300 students and teachers from 84 secondary schools.  The webinar covered an overview of the HKMA’s work, the Linked Exchange Rate System, Hong Kong banknotes, protection of personal digital keys, the Deposit Protection Scheme and career opportunities in the banking industry.  To date, more than 63,000 people have participated in the public education programme.
mt_raw: 為向社會宣傳及提高公眾對金管局工作的認識，一項公眾教育講座自一九九八年起已持續進行。二零二一年，金管局為超過二千三百名來自八十四間中學的學生及教師舉辦了一場網絡研討會。 研討會涵蓋了金管局的工作概述、聯繫匯率制度、香港鈔票、個人數碼鎖匙的保護、存款保障計劃以及銀行業的職業機會。 至今，已有超過六萬三千人參與了公眾教育講座。

src_raw: The HKMA educates and engages the public on how to be smart and responsible financial consumers.  In view of the increase in phishing scams, the HKMA conducted a public awareness campaign themed “Protect your Personal Digital Keys; Beware of Fraudulent Links!” with cross-media promotion to urge the public to stay vigilant against fraudulent hyperlinks embedded in SMS messages and emails purportedly from banks.
mt_raw: 金管局致力教育市民，並鼓勵市民成為負責任的金融服務消費者。鑑於網絡釣魚騙案有所增加，金管局舉辦了一項以「保護你的個人數碼鎖匙；提防虛假的超連結！」為主題的公眾教育活動，並透過多媒體宣傳，呼籲公眾時刻警惕嵌入簡訊和郵件中，據稱來自銀行的虛假的超連結。

src_raw: The HKMA also seeks to enhance the public’s understanding of the financial industry and raise the young generation’s interest in pursuing a career in the industry.  Following positive feedback to the online drama series “STEPS” in 2020, the HKMA launched a new series titled “Four Faces of Talents in Central” featuring four growing areas of the financial industry: data science, fintech, green and sustainable finance, and wealth management.  In the video series, the characters of the market practitioners were portrayed in a humorous manner, and seasoned industry players and young talents shared first-hand information on the nature and requirements of jobs, career opportunities and prospects across the above four growing areas.
mt_raw: 金管局亦致力提升公眾對金融業的認識，並提高年輕一代投身該行業的興趣。繼2020年網絡劇集「STEPS」獲得正面反饋後，金管局推出了一系列名為「中環4型人格」的新劇集，介紹金融業四個發展迅速的領域：數據科學、金融科技、綠色和可持續金融，以及財富管理。在影片系列中，市場從業員的角色以幽默的方式呈現，經驗豐富的業界人士和年輕人才分享了有關上述四個發展迅速領域的工作性質、要求、職業機會和前景的資訊。

mt_raw: 2020 年推出的「網上親子理財教育活動」於 2021 年 The MarketingEvents Awards 的「Best Event — Corporate Social Responsibility」類別中獲得銀獎。為延續活動的成功及維持進展，金管局推出額外舉措，包括一場親子理財工作坊，邀請兒童教育專家分享如何向孩子傳授正確的金錢觀念，並示範自製的理財教育玩具，以及一場金管局資訊中心的動漫虛擬導覽。

src_raw: To enhance financial literacy among secondary school students, the HKMA and various stakeholders co-organised the “Hong Kong Financial Literacy Championship”, which featured a fintech theme.  Apart from an online quiz, a new financial design thinking workshop on personal financial management was added to train the participating students to develop innovative proposals on money management tools.  This initiative won the “Highest Student Participation Award” offered by the Business-School Partnership Programme under the Education Bureau, and the “Investor and Financial Education Award (Corporate) — Gold Award” offered by the Investor and Financial Education Council2 (IFEC).
mt_raw: 為提升中學生的財務素養，金管局與各方攜手合辦「全港理財爭霸戰」，活動以金融科技為主題。除了網上測驗外，更加入了一項關於個人理財的設計思維工作坊，旨在訓練參與學生構思創新的理財工具方案。此舉榮獲教育局「商校合作計劃」頒發的「最高學生參與獎」，以及投委會（IFEC）頒發的「投資者及理財教育獎（企業）— 金獎」。

src_raw: To maintain a high level of transparency, the HKMA adopts international standards in financial disclosure insofar as these are applicable to central banking operations.  These include the Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards and other applicable reporting requirements, for example, the International Monetary Fund’s Special Data Dissemination Standard.  The Finance Division works with external auditors and other accounting professionals to prepare and present the Exchange Fund’s financial statements in accordance with the Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards.  The HKMA also provides detailed disclosures and thorough analyses of a wide range of expense items and budgetary information in its Annual Report.
mt_raw: 為保持高度透明度，金管局在適用於中央銀行運作的範圍內，採用國際標準作為財務披露的依據。這些標準包括香港財務報告準則及其他適用的報告要求，例如國際貨幣基金組織的數據公布特殊標準。財務處與外聘核數師及其他會計專業人士合作，按照香港財務報告準則準備及呈報外匯基金的財務報表。金管局亦在其年度報告中，就各種費用項目及預算資料提供詳細披露及深入分析。

src_raw: One of the HKMA’s most important tasks is to manage risks to the monetary and banking systems.  Risk management is undertaken both at a working level in the day-to-day operations and at a higher level through strategic planning. Under the HKMA’s risk management framework, there are two high-level committees — the Macro Surveillance Committee and the Risk Committee — both of which are chaired by the Chief Executive of the HKMA.
mt_raw: 金管局最重要的一項職責是管理對貨幣和銀行體系的風險。風險管理涵蓋日常營運及透過策略規劃的高層次管理。在金管局的風險管理框架下，設有兩個高層委員會，分別為宏觀監察委員會和風險委員會，兩者均由金管局總裁擔任主席。

terms: {'operational risk management': '業務操作風險管理', 'risk committee': '風險委員會', 'business unit': '業務單位', 'department level': '部門層面', 'emerge risk': '前路的風險', 'entity level': '機構層面', 'operational risk': '業務操作風險', 'risk management': '風險管理', 'risk management framework': '風險管理框架'}
src_raw: A robust operational risk management framework is in place covering organisational risks at two levels: the entity level and the department level.  Entity-level risks refer mainly to those which concern the entire organisation in the medium term, or which might call for a cross-departmental response. Potential and emerging risks identified by business units, and the adequacy of the control measures and mitigating strategies they devise, are reviewed and reported every quarter.  This is supplemented by a top-down approach to manage entity-level risks, in which senior colleagues heading different business units actively identify risks of wider impact and propose mitigating measures.  The Risk Committee discusses these assessments and decides on appropriate follow-up actions.
mt_raw: 目前已建立完善的業務操作風險管理架構，涵蓋機構層面與部門層面的組織風險。機構層面的風險主要指那些在中長期可能影響整個組織，或需要跨部門應對措施的風險。業務單位所識別出的潛在及前路的風險，以及其制定的控制措施與緩衝策略的充分性，將每季度進行審查並報告。此外，為管理機構層面的風險，採用自上而下的方法，由不同業務單位的高階主管主動識別具有更廣泛影響的風險，並提出緩衝措施。風險委員會將討論這些評估結果，並決定適當的後續行動。

src_raw: Climate change is one of the most pressing challenges facing the world today.  To combat climate change, countries agreed, under the Paris Agreement1, to take actions to cut greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and eventually achieve carbon neutrality within this century.  Meeting the Paris Agreement climate change target will require investments of an estimated US$1–2 trillion a year globally2, making sustainability one of the biggest drivers of capital flows in the decades ahead.
mt_raw: 氣候變化是當今世界面臨的最緊迫挑戰之一。為了應對氣候變化，各國在巴黎協定下同意採取行動以減少溫室氣體排放，並在本世紀內最終實現碳中和。實現巴黎協定氣候變化目標，預計每年全球將需要投資 1 至 2 兆美元，使可持續發展成為未來幾十年資本流動的最大驅動力之一。

mt_raw: 香港堅定不移地處於這一轉型的前沿。政府宣布將努力在2050年前實現碳中和，與全球先進經濟體系保持一致。香港也是亞洲第一個承諾到2025年在相關行業中將披露要求與氣候相關財務披露工作小組建議對齊的司法管轄區。

src_raw: To the financial sector, climate change is both a source of risk and opportunity. mt_raw: 對金融界而言，氣候變化既是風險也是機會。 雖然金融界無法倖免於氣候變化帶來的威脅，但它在轉型過程中扮演著關鍵角色，透過將更多資金導向與降低溫室氣體排放及具備氣候韌性的發展相符的活動。

src_raw: First, as a banking supervisor, the HKMA aims to strengthen resilience of the banking system against climate risks and to accelerate banks’ efforts in supporting the transition to a low-carbon economy.  To accomplish this, the HKMA has formulated a regulatory framework setting out supervisory requirements for banks to manage and disclose climate risks.  A pilot exercise on climate risk stress test to assess the resilience of the banking sector was also concluded successfully in 2021.  Meanwhile, on an ongoing basis, the HKMA takes into account climate change in monitoring financial stability risks.
mt_raw: 首先，作為銀行業監管機構，金管局旨在強化銀行體系對氣候風險的抗震能力，並加速銀行支持轉型至低碳經濟的努力。為此，金管局已制定監管框架，其中載明銀行管理和披露氣候風險的監管規定。二零二一年，關於氣候風險壓力測試試驗計劃的試點演練亦已成功完成。同時，金管局會持續將氣候變化納入監測金融穩定風險的考量之中。

src_raw: Secondly, in its market development role, the HKMA is focusing its efforts in enhancing Hong Kong’s role as a green and sustainable finance hub in the region, including the Greater Bay Area (GBA).  Hong Kong, being Mainland’s offshore financial centre, is well-positioned to channel global investments into Mainland’s plans to achieve peak carbon emissions by 2030 and carbon neutrality by 2060.  The HKMA is also working through the Green and Sustainable Finance Cross-Agency Steering Group (CASG)3, which the HKMA co-chairs, to build industry capacity, address data gaps and explore the development of a local green classification framework.
mt_raw: 其次，在市場發展方面，金管局正著力提升香港作為區域內綠色和可持續金融樞紐的地位，包括大灣區。香港作為內地的離岸金融中心，具備良好條件，可引導全球投資支持內地於2030年碳達峰及2060年碳中和的目標。金管局亦透過綠色和可持續金融跨機構督導小組，該督導小組由金管局共同主持，以提升業界能力、解決數據缺口，並探討本地綠色分類框架的發展。

src_raw: In fact, Hong Kong is a leader in green finance solutions, having established the world’s first government Global Medium Term Note Programme dedicated to green bond issuances under the Government Green Bond Programme, and increased gradually the diversity of its issuances since 2019, both in terms of currencies and tenors.  To support the issuance of green and sustainable bonds and loans in the private sector, the Government set up the Green and Sustainable Finance Grant Scheme in May 2021. Administered by the HKMA, this scheme has incentivised more corporates to seek green and sustainable financing in Hong Kong, and encouraged more green advisers and external reviewers to establish or expand their presence here.
mt_raw: 事實上，香港在綠色金融方案方面處於領先地位，已建立全球首個由政府推行的「全球中期票據發行計劃」，專門用於發行綠色債券，屬於「政府綠色債券計劃」的一部分。自2019年起，香港逐步增加發行綠色債券的多元化組成，包括貨幣種類及期限。為支持私人部門發行綠色及可持續債券和貸款，政府於2021年5月設立「綠色和可持續金融資助計劃」。該計劃由金管局管理，鼓勵更多企業在香港尋求綠色及可持續融資，並促進更多綠色顧問公司及外部評審機構在此設立或擴大業務。

src_raw: Fourthly, the HKMA is stepping up its own green office initiatives to ensure its own operations conform to best practices in the management and mitigation of climate risks.  As a start, the HKMA has established its carbon profile across Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions4, and made corresponding disclosures.  At the same time, the HKMA has implemented measures to enhance industry-wide operational efficiency and minimise resource consumption.  In addition, the HKMA holds itself to high standards of corporate social responsibility (CSR) and works with its stakeholders to promote financial inclusion and financial literacy.
mt_raw: 第四，金管局正加強其自身的綠色辦公室措施，以確保其運作符合管理和減緩氣候風險的最佳做法。作為開端，金管局已確立其涵蓋第一級和第二級排放量的碳分布，並作出相應披露。與此同時，金管局已實施措施以提升行業範圍內的運作效率，並盡量減少資源消耗。此外，金管局致力於高度的機構社會責任，並與其利益相關者合作促進普及金融和金融素養。

src_raw: In driving these sustainability initiatives and assessing climaterelated opportunities and risks, sustainability and green considerations are embedded in the HKMA’s governance and risk management frameworks, in which the leadership is actively involved in setting the overarching objectives and guiding principles, in consultation with the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC) and its sub-committees. The HKMA’s CSR and Sustainability Committee (CSC) also assesses the potential impacts of sustainability and climate-related issues on the organisation, and devises strategies to reduce the impacts.  Execution of the relevant strategies and initiatives is closely monitored and reported to the top management regularly.  In addition, external consultants have been engaged to advise the HKMA in selected areas of work.
mt_raw: 在推動這些可持續發展倡議並評估與氣候相關的機會與風險時，可持續發展及綠色考量已融入金管局的治理及風險管理框架中。領導層積極參與制定總體目標與指導原則，並與外匯基金諮詢委員會（EFAC）及其轄下委員會進行磋商。金管局的機構社會責任及可持續發展委員會（CSC）亦評估可持續發展及與氣候相關問題對機構的潛在影響，並制定策略以減輕這些影響。相關策略及倡議的執行情況會受到密切監測，並定期向高層管理層報告。此外，亦已聘請外部顧問就金管局特定工作範疇提供意見。

src_raw: This three-phased approach is an iterative and evolving process.  Further to the first round of greenness assessment conducted in 2020, the HKMA is reviewing the framework to encompass the new supervisory requirements on climate risk management and potentially cover a wider scope, such as other environmental risks and measures for supporting the net zero transition.   The HKMA intends to launch an updated framework in the second half of 2022.
mt_raw: 此三階段模式是一項迭代且持續演進的過程。繼2020年進行的第一輪綠色評估後，金管局正檢視框架，以納入有關氣候風險管理的新監管規定，並可能涵蓋更廣泛的範疇，例如其他環境風險及支持淨零排放轉型的措施。金管局預計於2022年下半年推出更新後的框架。

src_raw: Apart from incorporating climate risk considerations into the risk management framework, some banks have devoted resources and taken measures to support the goals of the Paris Agreement and contribute to achieving global net zero emissions.  The HKMA issued a circular in December 2021 to share with the industry the sound practices of these banks which would be of reference value to other banks in the industry in formulating their climate strategies.  These sound practices are grouped into four areas: reducing GHG emissions of the banks’ own operations, reducing financed emissions through portfolio alignment, assisting clients to transition, and promoting collective efforts to assist the economy to achieve a net-zero transition.
mt_raw: 除了將氣候風險考慮納入風險管理框架外，部分銀行已投入資源並採取措施，以支持巴黎協定目標，並為實現全球淨零排放做出貢獻。金管局於2021年12月發佈通函，與業界分享這些銀行的良好做法，供業界其他銀行制定氣候策略時參考。這些良好做法可歸納為四大範疇：減少銀行內部營運的溫室氣體排放、透過調整融資組合減少所融資的溫室氣體排放、協助客戶轉型，以及推動業界合作以協助經濟實現淨零轉型。

src_raw: To increase transparency across the financial markets and enable consistent policy making on green finance, the HKMA has been working with other financial regulators to explore a local green classification framework, which will facilitate navigation among the Common Ground Taxonomy (CGT) developed by the International Platform on Sustainable Finance (IPSF)8 and the green definitions adopted by China and European Union, for adoption across different financial sectors.  The work will be guided by the principles of interoperability, comparability and inclusiveness, taking into account other definitions of green, transitional activities and local considerations.  This initiative will reduce the risk of green washing, improve product comparability and ultimately enhance investor protection.
mt_raw: 為提升金融市場的透明度，並實現綠色金融政策的一致性，金管局已與其他金融監管機構合作，探討建立本地綠色分類框架，以協助在國際可持續金融平台（IPSF）所制定的共通綠色分類目錄（CGT）與中國及歐盟採用的綠色定義之間進行協調，並於不同金融領域推行應用。此項工作將以互換性、可比性及兼容性為原則，考慮其他綠色定義、過渡性活動及本地因素。此舉將降低漂綠風險，提升產品的可比性，並最終加強投資者的保障。

src_raw: To assess the banking sector’s ability to cope with potential shocks brought about by climate change, the HKMA undertook a pilot exercise on climate risk stress test (CRST), which included the participation of 20 major retail banks and seven branches of international banking groups.  A report summarising the results of the pilot CRST exercise was published in December 2021.  The results showed that the banking sector remained resilient even in the face of extreme climate-related shocks, although these shocks could potentially give rise to significant adverse impacts on banks’ financials.  The CRST exercise helped to enhance banks’ capabilities for measuring and assessing climate risks. In light of the CRST results, the participating banks have devised plans to strengthen their climate strategies and risk governance frameworks.  The HKMA will continue to engage the industry to strengthen banks’ capability and enhance the CRST framework, taking into account the lessons learnt from the pilot exercise.
mt_raw: 為評估銀行界應對氣候變化帶來的潛在衝擊能力，金管局進行了一項氣候風險壓力測試試驗計劃（CRST），包括20家主要零售銀行和七家國際銀行集團的分支機構參與。一份總結試驗計劃結果的報告於2021年12月發布。結果顯示，即使面對極端的氣候變化衝擊，銀行界仍然具有韌性，儘管這些衝擊可能對銀行財務造成重大的不利影響。該氣候風險壓力測試試驗計劃有助於提升銀行衡量和評估氣候風險的能力。鑒於氣候風險壓力測試試驗計劃的結果，參與銀行已制定計劃以加強其氣候策略和風險管治框架。金管局將繼續與業界合作，加強銀行的能力並完善氣候風險壓力測試試驗計劃框架，並吸取試驗計劃的經驗教訓。

The Group also had interests in one associate and twenty one joint ventures totalling HK$45,172 million, whose principal activities were holding overseas investment properties. src_raw: My objectives are to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion.  Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Audit Commission auditing standards will always detect a material misstatement when it exists.  Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.
mt_raw: 我的目標是取得合理保證，以確認財務報表整體是否不存在重大錯誤陳述，無論是因舞弊或錯誤所致，並出具包含我意見的審計報告。合理保證是一種高水平的保證，但並不能保證根據審計署的審計準則進行的審計始終能發現存在的重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可能來自舞弊或錯誤，若個別或合併起來，合理預期會影響使用者基於這些財務報表所做出的經濟決策，則視為重大。

terms: {'monetary authority': '金融管理專員', 'accounting estimate': '會計估計', 'accounting policy': '會計政策', 'audit evidence': '審計憑證', 'audit procedure': '審計程序', 'financial statement': '財務報表', 'go concern': '持續經營', 'go concern basis of accounting': '持續經營作為會計基礎', 'internal control': '內部監控', 'material misstatement': '重大錯誤陳述', 'material uncertainty': '重大不確定性'}
mt_raw:
- 識別及評估財務報表存在重大錯誤陳述的風險，無論是因欺詐或錯誤造成，設計並執行適當的審計程序，並取得足夠且適當的審計憑證，以作為我意見的依據。因欺詐可能涉及勾結、偽造、故意遺漏、虛偽或凌駕內部控制，未發現因欺詐導致的重大錯誤陳述的風險高於未發現因錯誤導致的重大錯誤陳述的風險；
- 為了設計在情況下適當的審計程序，我需要了解與審計相關的內部控制，但此目的並非為了對該集團的內部控制的有效性表示意見；
- 評估所使用的會計政策的恰當性以及金融管理專員所做的會計估計及相關披露的合理性；
- 得出結論關於金融管理專員使用持續經營作為會計基礎的恰當性，並根據取得的審計憑證，判斷是否存在與可能對該集團持續經營的能力產生重大疑慮的事件或情況相關的重大不確定性。如果我得出結論認為存在重大不確定性，我必須在我的審計報告中對財務報表中的相關披露事項加以提示，或者如果這些披露事項不足，則修改我的意見。我的結論是基於在我的審計報告日之前取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致該集團無法持續經營；
- 評估財務報表的整體呈現、結構和內容，包括披露事項，以及財務報表是否以實現公允表達的方式反映了基礎交易和事件；以及
- 取得關於集團內實體或業務活動的財務信息足夠且適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表表示意見。我對集團審計的指導、監督和執行負責。我對我的審計意見負有單獨的責任。

src_raw: From the matters communicated with the Audit Sub-Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I determine those matters that were of most significance in the audit of the financial statements of the current period and are therefore the key audit matters.  I describe these matters in my auditor’s report unless law or regulation precludes public disclosure about the matter or when, in extremely rare circumstances, I determine that a matter should not be communicated in my report because the adverse consequences of doing so would reasonably be expected to outweigh the public interest benefits of such communication.
mt_raw: 從與外匯基金諮詢委員會審核委員會溝通的事項中，我確定那些在本期財務報表審計中具有最重大意義的事項，因此這些即為關鍵審計事項。除非法律或法規禁止公開披露有關事項，或在極少數情況下，我認為披露該事項的不利後果將合理地超過披露該事項的公共利益效益，否則我會在審計師報告中說明這些事項。
